/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libcas_wrapper.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcas_wrapper.dylib CMakeFiles/cas_wrapper.dir/cas_wrapper.cpp.o  /usr/local/lib/libsymengine.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libmpc.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libmpfr.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libflint.dylib
